_note: Locked mouth/teeth layout, tuned in mouth-tuner.html. Coordinates in a 360-wide stage. Mouth image is square (h=mouthWidth).
toothFormula: for each of 5 columns x across span (centered): f = 1-((x-cx)/half)^2; toothCenterY = rowY + rowCurve*f. Upper row teeth flipped vertically. Render order: mouth-interior -> teeth -> gums(on top).
layering: treatment-room bg < animal head < mouth-interior(no gums) < teeth < gums(upper+lower ridge) ; gums on top hide the roots
